name: How much is my forklift accident case worth if I can't work?

mainEntity.name: How much is my forklift accident case worth if I can't work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp: medical + partial wages; third-party adds pain/suffering based on damages.[1][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Depends on medical costs, lost wages, permanency, and pain; comp covers 66-85% wages plus medical.** Full value higher in third-party suits.[1][3] Key factors: Calculate total bills, future care, wage loss; Utah caps non-economic but allows punitives rarely.[3] No insurance? Sue employer directly. Attorney evaluates via similar cases.

description: Comp: medical + partial wages; third-party adds pain/suffering based on damages.[1][3]
